response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, experienced software engineer with genuine staff-level credentials and broad full-stack depth, but he does not satisfy the core requirement of 8+ years building production AI solutions — his AI work appears concentrated in a single recent role (re:cinq, ~13 months). Critically, Python is absent from his skills list despite being a primary language in the job spec, and there is no explicit mention of vector databases, RAG pipelines, LangGraph/CrewAI, or LLM evaluation frameworks. His current work on MCP servers and agentic workflows is relevant and promising, but the AI-specific depth required for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role is not yet evident from the resume.
strengths: Genuine staff-level tenure with leadership and mentoring history across multiple companies and domains
Active hands-on work with MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers, AI-agent infrastructure, and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise and AWS CDK experience directly aligned with the cloud-delivery side of the role
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills section and work history, despite being a primary required language
No demonstrable experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
AI/GenAI experience is concentrated in one role started roughly 13 months ago, far short of the 8-year minimum for production AI solutions
